headline: MURRAYS BAY LIVING | RANGITOTO ZONED | IGNORE CV!
bodyHtml:
Murrays Bay Beachside Family Living - Ignore the CV! The current online CV of $1,450,000 was assessed prior to subdivision and does not reflect the property as it exists today.

The current owners have loved living here so much that, as their family grew, they chose not to leave the neighbourhood. Instead, they subdivided the property and built their dream home behind, allowing them to stay in the community they love while creating an opportunity for a new family to enjoy everything that makes this location so special.

Wake up to the salt air, wander down for a morning swim, and let the kids ride their bikes to the beach after school. Set in one of the North Shore's most tightly held seaside pockets, this beautifully presented family home sits on a freehold section just a short stroll from Murrays Bay Beach. This is the lifestyle most families only dream about.

The home is in fantastic order, with modern touches throughout that mean you can simply move in, unpack and start enjoying it. Split-level living gives the whole family room to spread out and have their own space, while heat pumps keep things comfortable all year round. Three double bedrooms include a private master with ensuite and walk-in wardrobe, while a second bathroom handles the morning rush with ease.

Step outside and the elevated covered deck provides the perfect setting for summer barbecues and entertaining. Internal access double garaging, a separate workshop and ample off-street parking provide plenty of room for the cars, boat and beach toys.

Location is where this property truly shines. Murrays Bay Beach, the iconic jetty and Murrays Bay Sailing Club are all within easy walking distance, while the scenic coastal walkway links you directly to Mairangi Bay and its popular cafés, restaurants and village atmosphere.

Mairangi Bay Village is only minutes away and the Northern Motorway keeps the CBD within easy reach. Add the sought-after zoning for Murrays Bay School, Murrays Bay Intermediate and Rangitoto College and you have the complete family package.

Homes that combine this position, presentation and lifestyle are becoming increasingly difficult to find. This is an opportunity to secure a slice of the Murrays Bay lifestyle.

headline: RANGITOTO & WESTLAKE ZONES. SEA VIEWS. BRAND NEW.
bodyHtml:
Wake up to sea views, walk the kids to some of Auckland's most sought-after schools, then finish the day with a stroll to Campbells Bay Beach. This is the lifestyle buyers search for but rarely find in a brand-new home.

Architecturally designed and finished to an exceptional standard, this brand-new residence has been thoughtfully crafted across two levels to offer the perfect balance of style, functionality and low-maintenance living. Whether you're upsizing, downsizing or simply looking for a home that lets you lock up and travel, this one delivers.

Four generous bedrooms, 3.5 beautifully appointed bathrooms and flexible living spaces provide room for growing families, professionals and guests alike. Sun-filled interiors, quality finishes and sea views combine to create a home that feels both luxurious and effortless.

Located just moments from Campbells Bay Beach, Centennial Park, cafés and local amenities, you'll also enjoy zoning for Campbells Bay School, Murrays Bay Intermediate, Rangitoto College and both Westlake Boys' and Westlake Girls' High Schools.

At a Glance

• Brand-new architecturally designed home
• Four bedrooms | 3.5 bathrooms
• Three-level floor plan with flexible living
• Sea views
• Designer kitchen with premium finishes
• Internal access garage plus off-street parking
• No body corporate fees
• Walk to Campbells Bay Beach and Centennial Park
• Zoned for Campbells Bay School, Murrays Bay Intermediate, Rangitoto College and both Westlake schools

By Negotiation. Contact Drew Miller or Harrison Cutfield today to arrange your private viewing.

headline: SEA VIEWS. SINGLE LEVEL. SCHOOL ZONES.
bodyHtml:
Some homes just feel right from the moment you walk in. The presentation, the lifestyle and the location all come together, and the decision starts to feel easy.

Elevated to capture its surroundings, this charming weatherboard home has been beautifully renovated to blend timeless character with modern comfort. The living is all on one level, flowing out to a generous deck where sweeping sea views and morning sunrises set the scene.

Whether it is a quiet coffee at dawn or friends around in the evening, this is a home that works for real life.

Set on a generous 883sqm freehold section, the property offers space, privacy and everyday ease. The fully fenced, low-maintenance yard gives kids and pets room to play, with scope to add the pool you have always wanted. Add a double carport, multiple off-street parks and extra storage, and the day-to-day simply works.

Beautifully finished, brilliantly zoned and ready to move straight into, this is a home that makes life feel a little easier.

FEATURES YOU'LL LOVE

• Beautifully renovated throughout, ready to enjoy from day one
• Generous 883sqm freehold section, more or less
• Charming weatherboard construction with real character
• Modern open-plan kitchen and living with quality Bosch appliances
• Stylish fully tiled bathroom, plus separate toilet
• Separate internal laundry
• Easy single-level living with a layout that flows
• Generous deck framing panoramic sea views and stunning sunrises
• Fully fenced, low-maintenance yard for kids and pets
• Room to add the pool you have always dreamed of
• Double carport, multiple off-street parks, plus extra storage
• Zoned for Rangitoto College, Westlake Girls High School and Murrays Bay Intermediate
• Close to transport links and quick motorway access
• All conjunctional agents welcome

Homes like this are tightly held and rarely available. This is your chance to secure sea views, top school zones and a brilliant lifestyle in one of the North Shore's most desirable coastal locations.

Mairangi Bay village and its beautiful beaches are only minutes away, making weekdays smoother and weekends something to look forward to.

AUCTION: Thursday 6 August 2026, from 5pm at Ray White Milford, unless sold prior
INFO: rwmairangibay.co.nz/MRG34943 - scroll down to documents

The location is prime. The hard work is done. The sellers are motivated.

Call now to view.

headline: Sea Views, Sunsets & Poolside Entertaining
bodyHtml:
Wake up to sea views, spend weekends by the pool, and enjoy Centennial Park quite literally over the back fence. Set in a tightly held Campbells Bay street, this substantial modern family home delivers space, separation and lifestyle in equal measure.

North-facing to capture all-day sun, the home has been designed for the way families really live. Generous proportions, multiple living options and excellent separation create room for everyone, whether the kids need their own space, guests are staying, or you simply want to entertain without compromising everyday family comfort.

The open, light-filled living areas flow naturally to an impressive outdoor entertaining zone, where a sparkling pool, relaxing spa and built-in bar create the perfect setting for long summer afternoons with family and friends. This is a home that works just as well for quiet weekday routines as it does for larger gatherings and milestone celebrations.

Beyond the back fence, the leafy outlook over Centennial Park and Pupuke Golf Club provides a rare sense of privacy, space and calm - something increasingly hard to find in such a premium coastal suburb.

At a glance:

• Five generous bedrooms and two bathrooms
• 310sqm of contemporary family living
• Substantial 1,017sqm freehold section
• Multiple living options with excellent family separation
• Pool, spa and dedicated entertaining area with built-in bar
• North-facing with sweeping sea views and sunsets
• Centennial Park directly over the back fence
• Backs onto Centennial Park and Pupuke Golf Club
• Double garaging with internal access
• Sought-after Campbells Bay location

The lifestyle on your doorstep is every bit as impressive as the home itself. Stroll to Campbells Bay School, wander down to Campbells Bay Beach, and reach the motorway in just a few minutes. Families will also appreciate the exceptional school zones, including Campbells Bay School, Murrays Bay Intermediate, Wairau Intermediate, Westlake Boys High School and Westlake Girls High School.

Sea views, north-facing sun, genuine family separation, resort-style entertaining and Centennial Park over the back fence - all wrapped inside one of the North Shore's most desirable school zones. Homes of this calibre, in a street like this, are rare and tightly held.

Auction: Thursday 23 July 2026, from 5pm, unless sold prior

Contact Harrison Cutfield or Drew Miller to view today.

headline: Resort-Style Family Living in Double Westlake Zone
bodyHtml:
Tucked away at the end of one of Forrest Hill's most tightly held cul-de-sacs, this substantial single-level concrete residence delivers the kind of lifestyle families spend years searching for.

Privately positioned down a gated driveway, the home immediately feels like a retreat - peaceful, secure and designed for effortless living. From the moment you step inside, the scale, separation and connection to the outdoors become apparent.

Offering four generous bedrooms, multiple living spaces and exceptional indoor-outdoor flow, this is a home built around entertaining and family life. At the centre of it all sits a sparkling resort-style swimming pool, separate pool house and dedicated spa room - creating the ultimate setup for summer entertaining, relaxed weekends and unforgettable family gatherings.

The floorplan works beautifully for families, with excellent separation between the master suite and the additional bedrooms, delivering both privacy and practicality.

Solid concrete construction provides peace of mind, while the extensive parking options are a genuine rarity - including a double internal access garage/workshop, substantial off-street parking for up to four vehicles and room for additional cars, a boat or trailer.

Positioned in the heart of Forrest Hill, you're just moments from local shops, supermarkets, parks, transport links and motorway access, while also benefiting from zoning for some of the North Shore's most sought-after schools, including Forrest Hill School, Westlake Boys High School and Westlake Girls High School.

Homes offering this level of privacy, construction quality, entertaining capability and family functionality are incredibly hard to find.

Features Include:

• Solid concrete construction
• Single-level family living
• Four spacious bedrooms
• Multiple living areas
• Resort-style swimming pool
• Separate pool house
• Dedicated spa room
• Exceptional indoor-outdoor entertaining
• Double internal access garage/workshop
• Extensive off-street parking
• Quiet gated cul-de-sac position
• Double Westlake zoning

A home designed for entertaining, built for family living and positioned for long-term enjoyment - 26 Baltimore Place is ready to welcome its next family.

Call today to arrange your private viewing.

headline: Built With Purpose! Designed for Life!
bodyHtml:
Built with intent and precision, this bespoke four-bedroom home sets a new benchmark for modern living on Auckland's North Shore. It has been carefully designed to be comfortable, practical, and is highly economical to run, with smart energy and an option for rain water to be captured and reused to help keep monthly power and water bills low.

Beyond its architectural appeal, this is a home that works exceptionally well in everyday life. Heating, hot water, insulation, and energy use have all been thoughtfully considered to reduce ongoing costs without compromising comfort - a genuine advantage for families, professionals, and long-term owners.

The home welcomes all generations, with wider doorways (suitable for wheelchair access), level thresholds, and flexible living spaces that can adapt as needs change over time. Accessibility has been integrated from the outset, not added later, making this a future-ready home in the truest sense.

This is not a quick build or a standard spec home. It is a carefully considered residence, built to last, easy to live in, and designed to support real life - now and into the future.

Architecture that performs.
A community that connects.
A home that stands the test of time.

Why You'll Love It

• Freehold title
• Four generous bedrooms, three stylish bathrooms, and two versatile living areas
• Lifemark 5-Star accessibility - designed for all ages and stages of life
• Low running costs with smart energy and water systems
• Architecturally designed and purposefully built with quality materials
• Built to exceed NZ Building Code - solar-ready and low maintenance
• 10-year Stamford warranty for long-term peace of mind
• Excellent school zoning including Rangitoto College and Westlake Boys' & Girls' High Schools
• Easy access to motorways, public transport, beaches, parks, North Shore Hospital, and shopping hubs
• All agents welcome

Homes of this calibre are rarely available - thoughtfully designed, economical to run, and built for long-term living.

**Please note that the photos shown are from the completed property 394C Show home.

For further information or to arrange a private viewing, please get in touch today!

headline: WICKED SUNSETS, CITY LIGHTS & WESTLAKE ZONES!
bodyHtml:
Elevated high above Forrest Hill in a tightly held pocket, this beautifully renovated brick and tile home enjoys spectacular western sunsets, sparkling city lights, and views stretching towards Lake Pupuke and beyond, and the city skyline.
No body corporate fees here - it's move-in ready and packed with value!

The home features a brand-new kitchen, full interior and exterior repaint, new carpet and vinyl throughout, plus a sunny north-facing conservatory that captures all-day sun.

Warm and comfortable year-round with insulation and a heat pump, the layout offers two generous bedrooms, a family bathroom and separate toilet, and excellent storage throughout.

One of the standout features is the approximately 30m² high-stud carpeted tandem garage - an incredibly versatile space for vehicles, storage, hobbies, a workshop, or simply room to spread out.

Healthy Homes compliant and beautifully presented, this is an ideal first home, lock-up-and-leave, or investment opportunity in one of the North Shore's most sought-after school zones.

AUCTION: Thursday 16 July 2026, from 5pm at Ray White Milford (unless sold prior)
INFO: http://rwmairangibay.co.nz/MRG34887 (scroll down to documents)

FEATURES YOU'LL LOVE:

- Elevated position with views over Lake Pupuke and to the Auckland city skyline
- Spectacular western sunsets and city lights
- Brick and tile end unit - No Body Corporate Fees!
- Brand-new kitchen
- Full interior & exterior repaint
- New carpet and vinyl throughout
- Two generous bedrooms
- Separate bathroom
- Separate toilet
- North-facing conservatory capturing all-day sun
- Heat pump and insulation
- Healthy Homes compliant
- Approximately 30m² high-stud carpeted tandem garage
- Zoned for Campbells Bay Primary, Forrest Hill Primary, Wairau Intermediate, Takapuna Normal Intermediate, Murrays Bay Intermediate, Westlake Boys High School, Westlake Girls High School, and Carmel College

Can't make the open home? Call us today to arrange a private viewing.

Views Like This Don't Last. Premium Location. Act Now.

headline: Endless Views. Single-Level Living. Private Brewery?
bodyHtml:
Endless Views. Single-Level Living. Private Brewery?

Single-level living, positioned to capture sweeping views across the Waitakere Ranges.

Located within Coatesville's sought-after "Golden Triangle", this elevated, sun-filled property offers a rare combination of space, privacy, and ultra-convenient access to Albany.

Set on approximately 1.25 hectares, the home delivers the best of lifestyle living, space, usability, and functionality, without the time, cost, and uncertainty of undertaking major upgrades.

At its core, a north-facing living hub captures all-day sun, featuring underfloor heating, a well-appointed kitchen, and multiple living zones that flow seamlessly to covered outdoor entertaining.

Step outside and it truly comes into its own, a private retreat complete with a heated spa and a self-cleaning pool, designed for year-round enjoyment.

A true standout feature is the bespoke entertaining offering. A converted outbuilding now operates as a private microbrewery, with the brewing process feeding directly into a dedicated games and entertaining space within the home, complete with a full bar, taps, and room to host on any scale.

While many lifestyle properties focus inward on their own grounds, this property opens outward to expansive, uninterrupted views across the Waitakere Ranges and beyond, all while still enjoying beautifully established gardens.

Inside, the home offers:
• Five double bedrooms
• Predominantly single-level living with additional upstairs media room
• Multiple living areas including media and games room
• Separate study
• Spacious master suite with walk-in wardrobe, ensuite, and office area
• North-facing covered outdoor entertaining flowing from the kitchen
• Well-established gardens

The land is mostly flat and highly usable, with level lawns and fenced paddocks, ideal for children, animals, or simply enjoying the lifestyle on offer.

Positioned near the Coatesville trig station, this elevated setting delivers both privacy and a commanding outlook, while still being part of a well-established community.

Zoned for Coatesville Primary, Albany Junior and Senior High, with local cafés nearby and only approximately 10 minutes to Albany.

The current owners have invested significantly to enhance and modernise the home, creating a property that is comfortable, functional, and ready to be enjoyed.

Lifestyle living in Coatesville, done properly.

Contact Drew or Dane today to arrange a private viewing or visit one of our upcoming open homes.
